title: Long Distance Cycling with Hemorrhoids: 9 Soothing Herbal Ointments
description: Aloe barbadensis creams have been used for centuries to help soothe and heal hemorrhoids. This is because they contain properties like aloe-emodin, aloin, and vitamins A, C, and E, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. These constituents help reduce swelling, itching, and pain associated with hemorrhoids, making it easier to manage symptoms and promote healing.
